focus: Expose stable comparison endpoints for key Cranfield architecture milestones without changing the public/default route behavior.
reason_started: The operator requested search and explain endpoints for key milestones after GEN-023 validated the BGE vector/hybrid candidate remotely.
reason_ended: Milestone routes now expose ARCH-0.1 baseline and ARCH-0.2 PRF live search/explain paths, while ARCH-0.3 BGE returns an explicit runtime-not-enabled response until query-vector support exists.

validators_executed.name: node --test test/worker.test.js
validators_executed.evidence: Verified baseline and PRF milestone routing, BGE runtime limitation response, and unknown milestone error behavior.

validators_executed.name: node --test test/no-runtime-llm.test.js
validators_executed.evidence: Verified live source still has no runtime generative provider dependency.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: Node tests, MDE parser, traceability validation through GEN-024, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed. Final run is recorded in VAL-034.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-024 is local until explicit deploy approval.

validators_skipped.name: Remote BGE runtime query validation
validators_skipped.reason: The BGE milestone endpoint intentionally returns 501 until runtime query-vector generation or a bounded known-query embedding cache is implemented.

evidence_quality_notes: The milestone endpoints make evolution comparison easier without changing /api/search or /api/explain.
Candidate routes include milestone metadata so readers can see whether a path is released, candidate, or runtime-limited.
The BGE endpoint does not fake vector search for arbitrary queries.
